title: One bridge for every ship, one camera logging your every move
body: Marco Rubio says Tehran is "clearly not serious about making a deal," per Al Jazeera, as the US and Iran trade attacks for a twelfth straight day. Trump has drawn a new line. Every time Iran hits a ship in the Strait of Hormuz, the US will destroy a bridge or a power plant, including ones in Tehran. Oil jumped past $98 after tankers were struck off Saudi Arabia. We are one miscalculation from a war nobody voted for, and the people setting the terms keep talking like the cost lands on someone else.

Closer to home, 404 Media keeps tracking Flock. There are now more than 100,000 of its cameras on American roads, logging your plate, your car's make and color, even its dents and bumper stickers, then storing where you were and when. More than 70 cities have already pulled the plug.
"Those who would give up essential Liberty, to purchase a little temporary Safety, deserve neither Liberty nor Safety" - Benjamin Franklin
